texto: I stood and looked at the large framed painting of the Pierrot clown that hung on her wall and sympathised with the tears that rolled down its cheek. Like the clown, I felt contained within a frame, the only difference being my tears were not for public show.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Eileen Munroe: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I stood and looked at the large framed painting of the Pierrot clown that hung on her wall and sy…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, sadness, clown pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
